description_long: This office building features a distinctive X-shaped footprint with four protruding wings, each clad in a blue-gray glass and steel facade. The exterior is dominated by a grid of regularly spaced, rectangular windows, giving the building a modern, corporate appearance. The central section is recessed, with a prominent black entryway visible on one side, likely serving as the main entrance. The roof is flat and patterned with alternating light and dark stripes, possibly indicating rooftop access or mechanical areas. The structure appears to be multi-storied, with at least five visible floors, and the overall design emphasizes symmetry and repetition. There is no visible signage or decorative elements, reinforcing its utilitarian, International Style aesthetic.
description: A modern, X-shaped office building with blue-gray glass and steel facades, regular rectangular windows, and a prominent central entrance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the recessed central section and the main black entryway, with symmetrical wings extending outward.
description_view_1: Angled top-down view highlighting the X-shaped footprint and striped rooftop pattern, with all four wings visible.
description_view_2: Rear view with the central section visible but no entryway, emphasizing the regular window grid and building symmetry.
description_view_3: Angled top-down view from the opposite side, again showing the X-shaped layout and rooftop details.
attribute_window_pattern: Regularly spaced, rectangular windows arranged in horizontal bands across all facades.
